footer.tagline: The pro website that brings you clients, live in 48h. No hassle, no commitment.

hero.subtitle: Plumber, mechanic, running your own cleaning business? We build your website for you — polished and designed to win you new clients. Live in 48h, no hassle.

problem.titleLine1: Being great at your job isn't enough anymore.
problem.titleLine2: People still have to find you.
problem.description: These days, the first thing a client does is Google. Without a credible website, you let your competitors take the calls that should have been yours.
problems: Your clients look for you on Google… and don't find you.
A Facebook page is no longer enough to earn trust.
Web agency quotes run to 1 500€, or a lot more.
You have neither the time nor the desire to manage a site yourself.
promises: A site that puts you in front of people when they search for your trade nearby.
A polished storefront that reassures people and makes them want to call you.
49€ to set up, 9,99€/month. All-inclusive, no surprises.
You touch nothing: we handle everything, you just approve.

process.title: Four steps. Then your first requests start coming in.
process.description: No jargon, no endless meetings. You give us the essentials, we do the rest.

steps.title: You fill out the form
steps.body: A few minutes to describe your business, your services and your contact details. Examples guide you at every step.

steps.title: We build your site
steps.body: Our team designs a professional site, polished and built for your trade. Nothing to install, nothing to set up.

steps.title: It's live in 48h
steps.body: Your site is published on your own .fr domain name (free — we handle it for you), optimized for mobile and to show up on Google locally.

steps.title: You receive your client requests
steps.body: Contact form, call button and WhatsApp: requests land straight in your hands, ready to turn into jobs.

portfolio.title: Simple, credible sites that work for their owners.
portfolio.description: Every site is built for one trade and one area, and for mobile first. Here are a few of the businesses we work with.

benefits.title: A website, but above all more clients.
benefits.description: Not just a pretty page: a tool that works for you every day, even when you're out on a job.

items.title: People find you on Google
items.body: Optimized for local search: you show up when a client looks for your trade nearby.

items.title: Requests come straight to you
items.body: Contact form and notifications: every request drops right into your inbox, ready to call back.

items.title: Call button & WhatsApp
items.body: Your clients call you or message you on WhatsApp in a single tap, straight from their phone.

items.title: Secure and worry-free
items.body: Hosting, HTTPS, backups and updates: we handle all the tech, your site stays online.

items.title: Perfect on mobile
items.body: 8 out of 10 visitors come from a phone. Your site is fast, sharp and easy to read on the smallest screen.

items.title: Unlimited edits
items.body: New price, new photo, summer hours? You write to us, we update it — often the same day, within 3 business days at the latest.

formules.title: Three plans, simple and clear.
formules.description: You start wherever you want, you switch whenever you want. No surprises, and always without commitment.

faq.title: Everything you're wondering, straight to the point.
faq.description: Another question? Write to us — we answer fast and clearly.

items.q: How long until my site is live?
items.a: 48h after we receive your information through the form. You approve a version, we adjust it if needed, then we publish. No meetings, no spec document to write.

items.q: Am I tied in for a fixed term?
items.a: No. It's commitment-free: 49€ once at setup, then 9,99€/month. You stop whenever you want, with a single message.

items.q: What if I want to change my site later?
items.a: Content edits are unlimited and included in the subscription. You write to us what you want to change, we take care of it — usually the same day, and within 3 business days at the latest.

items.q: Who owns the site and the domain name?
items.a: The content (text, photos) is yours. The .fr domain name is free and managed by Xklic: we buy it and take care of it for you for the whole duration of your subscription — you have nothing to do. If you stop, you can ask to recover your domain through our contact form (full conditions detailed in our terms of sale).

You pay online securely (Stripe) at the end of the form: only the 49€ setup fee today. The first monthly charge of 9,99€ comes the following month, and it's commitment-free — you stop whenever you want.

items.q: I don't have a SIRET yet, is that possible?
items.a: Yes. You can start without a SIRET and send it to us later. We simply put « registration in progress » on the site in the meantime.

items.q: I offer home care services — is the tax credit highlighted?
items.a: Absolutely. If you're eligible for the 50% tax credit, we show it clearly on your site — it's a decisive selling point for your clients.

finalCta.subtitle: A few minutes to fill out the form. We handle the rest. No commitment, no payment today.
